name: Video Content
description: Assess the ENTIRE VIDEO to identify any content quality issues based on the following classifications:

subcategories.name: Suitability
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video is poorly made or unsuitable for use as paid advertising content targeted at adults. If the video is well-made and suitable, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.

subcategories.name: Brand Exclusive
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video features or mentions ANY competing brands other than {company}. If no competing brands appear, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.

subcategories.name: Product Line Focus
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the {product_line} product line is NOT the primary focus. If {product_line} IS the primary focus, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory. Secondary mentions of other products are acceptable and should not trigger an issue.

subcategories.name: Tone
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video contains negative or derogatory content towards {company} or the {product_line} product line. If the tone is positive or neutral, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.
